overview: Professional manufacturer website for Gayatri Metal Products — a brass and copper precision components company founded in 1985 in Jamnagar, Gujarat, India.
features: Fixed navbar with mobile hamburger menu
Hero section with company tagline and CTA
About section with company history and key stats
16 product category cards with hover animations
Contact section with address, phone, email and contact form
Fully responsive design with Framer Motion scroll animations
